headings.text: Direct effect of board gender diversity and emissions performance

Moderating effect of ESG on EP, particularly regarding emissions reduc tion, is contingent on the firm’s legitimacy environment. Firms that practice strong legitimacy may choose to achieve both social and economic gains
To fill the gap in the literature, this study examines whether firms’ involvement in ESGC weakens the link between BGD and EP.
Direct effect of board gender diversity and emissions performance
Moderating effect of ESG controversy on the relationship between BGD and EP
Mediating effect of environmental innovation on the relationship between BGD and EP
